creator: sakaue.mamoru@samurai.mwghennn.net
text:
Update of ports-mgmt/portsreinstall to the latest version 2.2.1.

In this version, more improvements are made so as to avoid repeating wasteful reinstallation whose required ports are not updated due to failures.

A command name and its related messages are also modified.

Fix: Apply the attached patch.

Patch attached with submission follows:
